name: solve
description: Solve math problems with clear work shown. Use this for direct answers with key solution steps. For extremely detailed learning-focused explanations, use step instead.

problem.description: Math problem to solve (e.g., '2x+3=7', '求导 x^2+3x', '计算定积分')

name: step
description: Provide extremely detailed step-by-step solutions with explanations for each step. Use this for learning purposes when user needs thorough understanding. For quick answers, use solve instead.

problem.description: Math problem to solve step by step (e.g., '求导 x^2+3x', '解方程 2x+3=7')

name: graph
description: Describe and sketch function graphs using ASCII art. Provides domain, range, intercepts, asymptotes, and behavior analysis. Use this when user needs visual representation of mathematical functions.

name: formula
description: Math formula reference organized by category. Use this to quickly look up formulas for algebra, geometry, trigonometry, calculus, probability, statistics, and linear algebra.

topic.description: Formula category to look up (e.g., 'algebra', 'geometry', 'trigonometry', 'calculus', 'statistics', 'linear algebra')

name: convert
description: Unit conversion calculator. Converts between length, area, volume, mass, temperature, speed, data, time, angle, and pressure units. Use this for accurate unit conversions with formulas shown.

conversion.description: Conversion query (e.g., '5km to miles', '100F to C', '1kg to pounds', '50C to F')

name: practice
description: Generate math practice problems with answers organized by grade level and topic. Covers elementary through college math. Use this to create practice exercises for learning.

topic.description: Topic and level for practice problems (e.g., '初中代数', '高中函数', '小学分数', '大学微积分')
